note: Production authentication keys migration and collections stabilization
changes: Changed
Migrated authentication and serverless API integration to production Clerk keys (pk_live/sk_live).
Fixed
Resolved infinite recursion error in catalog by scoping localized translation variables within IIFEs.
Fixed
Synchronized favorites API state changes locally to immediately update bookmark states without page reload.
Fixed
Updated build distribution script to correctly package and cache-bust the new collections component.

note: Cloud-synced favorites bookmarks and collection management
changes: Added
D1 SQL database table user_favorites and unique indexes to store user bookmarks in the cloud.
Added
Serverless API endpoints GET /api/favorites, POST /api/favorites, and DELETE /api/favorites/:id with Clerk validation.
Added
Visual collections card grid view with lazy loading, skeleton states, and empty placeholders.
Added
Interactive bookmark/favorite toggle button in details drawer and on collection grid cards with pop scale animations.
Changed
Upgraded CollectionsView to leverage Favorites API with Clerk session token headers for authorization.
Added
Fully localized 21 new favorites/collections labels across all 8 supported languages.

note: Review options, precision filtering, and profile nickname-only support
changes: Added
Clerk Authentication and Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA integration.
Added
Native comments/reviews section with moderator approval workflow.
Added
Support for dynamic co-creator inputs and custom tags in game submissions.
Added
Enforced strict limits on custom tags (maximum 10 tags per entry, 20 characters per tag).
Added
Optional rating and difficulty independent toggle switches in review editor.
Added
Numeric input boxes for precise range filtering of ratings and difficulty.
Added
Automated R2 mirroring for approved submissions (packages & screenshots) in GitHub Actions deploy pipeline.
Changed
Reconfigured user profile settings to map to a single Nickname field and hide Last Name.
Changed
Decoupled Clerk authentication loading and parallelized database downloads to optimize cold load speeds.
Fixed
Resolved auth redirect flow state loss using sessionStorage to restore UI drawer viewport state.
Removed
Operator filter and column in the Admin Portal audit logs table.
Added
Full multi-language support (i18n) for 8 languages (en, zh-CN, zh-TW, ja, ko, ru, fr, de) with automatic detection based on browser language and manual toggle dropdown in top bar.
Removed
Obsolete and unused administrative files: health.jsx and crawler.jsx.

note: Refactor unrated metrics and layout improvements
changes: Refactored
Represent unrated ratings and difficulties as null in memory to differentiate from true zero scores.
Fixed
Pre-nullify unrated metrics during database chunking to resolve unrated games displaying 0.0 on the catalog.
Added
Custom sort and filter logic in the catalog to push unrated games to the bottom and filter them accurately.
Added
Prefix review ratings with 'rating' label inside the game details panel comments section.
Fixed
Exclude unrated difficulty values from playlist average difficulty calculations.
Added
New Update Log section with timeline visualization.
Added
Separate application versioning scheme (Year.xxx) to track content releases.
Added
Initial public release of the standalone Fangame Archive catalog.
